gpu.topology:
[4mGPU0	GPU1	GPU2	GPU3	CPU Affinity	NUMA Affinity	GPU NUMA ID[0m
GPU0	 X 	NV18	NV18	NV18	0-95	0		N/A
GPU1	NV18	 X 	NV18	NV18	0-95	0		N/A
GPU2	NV18	NV18	 X 	NV18	0-95	0		N/A
GPU3	NV18	NV18	NV18	 X 	0-95	0		N/A

Legend:

  X    = Self
  SYS  = Connection traversing PCIe as well as the SMP interconnect between NUMA nodes (e.g., QPI/UPI)
  NODE = Connection traversing PCIe as well as the interconnect between PCIe Host Bridges within a NUMA node
  PHB  = Connection traversing PCIe as well as a PCIe Host Bridge (typically the CPU)
  PXB  = Connection traversing multiple PCIe bridges (without traversing the PCIe Host Bridge)
  PIX  = Connection traversing at most a single PCIe bridge
  NV#  = Connection traversing a bonded set of # NVLinks

eval_env:
# =============================================================================
# h100x4_qwen1.5b_hybrid.env
#
# 목적: Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct 를 H100x4 + Xeon 8480+ 에서 hybrid 모드로
#       **최적 속도**로 실험. GPU-only 벤치와 바로 비교 가능.
#
# (rename 이력: 직전 버전명 `h100x4_qwen1.5b_hybrid_smoke.env`.
#  원래 smoke 용이었으나 본 파일은 production 실험 config 로 재정의됨.)
#
# 최적화 선택의 근거:
#   - Routing strategy = **throughput-adaptive** + **cpu-first**
#     → H100 085801 실험에서 hybrid wall ≈ GPU-only wall (ratio 1.008×) 로
#        hybrid penalty 0 달성. 적응형이 slow CPU 를 1 회 probe 후 나머지를
#        GPU 로 우회해 BW-bound 구간에서도 손해 없음이 실증됨.
#        (experiment_result/20260411_085801_h100x4_qwen1.5b_thro_adaptive_500/)
#   - **Silent stdout** (TRACE=0, EVERY=0, LOGGING_LEVEL default)
#     → capacity + TRACE=1 로 실험하면 main thread stdout serialize 로 wall ×7.6.
#        (experiment_result/20260411_090942_h100x4_qwen1.5b_capacity_trace_on_500/,
#         experiment_result/20260411_121509_analysis_stdout_scaling_on_fast_hardware/)
#   - **auto everything** (num_cpu_engines=0, max_seqs=0, threads=0, kvcache=0)
#     → 논문 §3.4 원칙: num_cpu_engines=NUMA, max_seqs=1 per engine,
#        threads=all physical cores. H100x4 KVM(1 NUMA, 96 core) 에서 auto 가 정답.
#   - **warmup=10** → throughput-adaptive EMA 초기 안정화
#   - `HYBRID_CPU_PREFILL_THRESHOLD=1024` → prefill 도 CPU 후보 (in=128 시 적용 안 됨)
# =============================================================================

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Model
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL=Qwen/Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct
PORT=8000

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Server (H100x4 TP=4, 1.5B BF16 ≈ 3 GB — VRAM 여유, CUDA graphs 기본 활성)
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
GPU_MEMORY_UTIL=0.90
TENSOR_PARALLEL_SIZE=4
TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE=1
HF_DATASETS_OFFLINE=1
EXTRA_SERVE_ARGS="--max-model-len 4096"

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Benchmark — 500 req burst, 표준 128/128 shape
# 짧은 shape 으로 wall time 최소화. 길이 분포 실험이 필요하면 ShareGPT env 사용.
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
NUM_PROMPTS=500
INPUT_LEN=128
OUTPUT_LEN=128
REQUEST_RATE=inf

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Hybrid (모든 CPU 파라미터 auto — 설계 원칙 적용)
#   num_cpu_engines = NUMA nodes (auto → 1 on H100x4 KVM)
#   cpu_max_num_seqs = 1 per engine (원칙 고정)
#   cpu_threads = 96 (auto, 물리 코어 전체)
#   cpu_kvcache_gb = clamp(eff_mem × 0.4, 32, 512) (auto)
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
HYBRID_CPU_KVCACHE_GB=0
HYBRID_CPU_THREADS=0
HYBRID_NUMA_AWARE=true
HYBRID_NUM_CPU_ENGINES=0
HYBRID_STATS_LOG_INTERVAL=50        # 50 완료마다 Router stats (debug level → INFO 에서는 안 보임)

HYBRID_ROUTING_STRATEGY=throughput-adaptive
HYBRID_ROUTING_PRIORITY=cpu-first
HYBRID_CPU_PREFILL_THRESHOLD=1024
HYBRID_WARMUP_REQUESTS=10

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Logging — **serving silent** (production 실험 필수)
#   - VLLM_HYBRID_TRACE=0: [HYBRID-CPU-ATTN] / [HYBRID-CPU-EXEC] per-call OFF
#   - VLLM_HYBRID_TRACE_EVERY=0: periodic 주기 emit OFF
#   - 부팅 단계의 [HYBRID-RESOLVE/LAUNCH/CPU-ENV/CPU-PROC/CPU-WORKER] 는
#     INFO level 이라 여전히 한 번씩 emit (경로 검증용, throughput 영향 없음)
#   - 경로 재진단 필요 시 h100x4_qwen*_hybrid_debug.env 같은 별도 파일 사용 권장
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VLLM_HYBRID_TRACE=0
VLLM_HYBRID_TRACE_EVERY=0

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Monitoring / results
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
MONITOR_INTERVAL=1
RESULTS_DIR=results
SERVER_READY_TIMEOUT=900
SERVER_READY_POLL=5
